Hi Julie, sorry for the delay in responding, we just moved our studio into a new building yesterday and life is upside down right now ha ha.
Middle of February is great for us, you can pretty much choose the date and time that works for you.  I would anticipate needing an hour of shooting time, with 30 minutes set up prior and 30 minutes breakdown after (so please reserve your room for 2 hours) but we will only need to give students a 1 hour window of time to be photographed.
We can do the photos according to the specifications for $15 per student (this way, instead of a flat fee for all of them, you are not stuck paying for kids that don’t show up).  We will deliver the digital files within 24 hours of the shoot and guarantee acceptance by any government agency needing them.  We will also keep an archival copy on our side, should you ever need them again and are unable to find them.
So, if this is all ok, we can compare calendars!  We won’t bill you until after we know how many subjects we had, and at that time I will make sure you have the W9 paperwork you need!
Thank you so much!
Steph

We only need digital formats so that students can upload them with applications.

Hi Tom!
Thank you so much for the opportunity to quote this job!   
We would need about 2 hours to complete all the headshots and group photo for approximately 25 people.  If helpful I can create an online signup form with 5 minute intervals so people can come in a little more organized manner and not stand around waiting.   We can arrange for the group photo either at the beginning or the end of our time there.
I would recommend bringing studio strobe lighting and taking the headshots on a neutral background.  This way, I can provide you consistent well-lit images of everyone regardless of the ambient lighting in the office or the changes that occur over a two hour period with daylight.   Further, I can provide you with both the neutral background as photographed AND remove that background and put an environmental scene behind them so you have that as an option, too.
Our price is $800 and includes the following: 
2 hours on site (plus additional time to set up and break down, 30 minutes on each end)
Optional online sign up if desired 
At least five images of each staff member 
All images organized by staff, artfully retouched, in full resolution with a commercial copyright release (each staff member will have their own online gallery and you will receive links to all of them plus another one with all the files in one place)
All files provided in original form (neutral background), plus transparent (no) background, plus environmental background if desired
Here is a quick example of our work, I wouldn’t necessarily use a green backdrop as our neutral unless it matched your color palette but so you can see an example:
Smile Lodge Doctor Headshots June 2024 - iSmile
ismile.smugmug.com
Standing by if you have any questions or you are ready to schedule a date. 
Thank you SO MUCH! 
Sincerely, 
Steph

picture_day_info:
Hi Lauren,

It is so nice to meet you. Stephanie, thank you so much for the introduction. I so appreciate you both and Lauren thank you so much for being there on March 22. This bride-to-be is actually my future daughter-in-law, Sarah. Stephanie was gracious enough to be there for my daughter Lauren’s bridal shower back in 2023. The pictures were amazing, and I am so happy you will be there for my son’s future wife. The shower starts at 1 pm, so Lauren if you would like to get there at 12:30 pm that would be great, and leaving at 3:30 sounds good – I completely trust your judgement so when you feel as though you have enough, please feel free to take off. Also, we will plan on you having brunch with us so if you have any dietary restrictions, please let me know and I will handle it.

My dear friend, Stephanie is so kind to do this for us again. I value our friendship more than you know (and therefore she is stuck with me no matter what and I will never forget about her - 😊). Lauren, my cell phone is 518-376-7417. Please let me know if you need anything.

Thank you, thank you, thank you! You guys are the best!

Joanne
Hi Steph,

I am so excited to have you there on Saturday – you have no idea! Lauren is so excited as well. Arriving at 12 pm is perfect and the whole plan sounds amazing. Please come hungry as we are serving brunch and the food is supposed to be excellent. We will be at the Edison Club - 891 Riverview Road, Rexford, NY 12148.  I believe you have my cell phone but just in case – it is 518-376-7417.

Thank you so much!

Joanne

Also, send me the link for the Google Review – any time I can sing your praises, I am ready. Thanks so much.

We have the date available for the baby shower and would love to provide the photo booth.   Our booth does not print - is that ok?  Instead it sends images via text or email right away.    We can either set it up facing a wall, or (my preference) facing out into the shower to have the party vibe in the background.
We can also create a custom border that includes a caption/date etc and we can incorporate the colors you are using if you want.
The booth is $150 per hour with a 2 hour minimum, so $450 for 11 - 2.
Alternatively, we can send a photographer to do professional photos of your shower - that would include posed and candid pictures with the mom to be with all her guests.  That is also $150 per hour and you would receive all the digital files.  If you choose that route, we recommend doing the first two hours of the event, it gets very repetitive after that - so your fee would be $300.

I wanted to reach out because we are hosting a women in leadership event at Siena on 
October 23
. The event is being sponsored by Boeing and I've outlined the event details below. Would you be interested and available to take headshots of our students? If so, can you let me know what you typically charge for your services?
As an aside, I heard you have a child who will be a senior this year. Congratulations! Our office handles Commencement, so I'm happy to help answer any questions you might have. 
Potential Event Description: 
A panel discussion featuring three to four local and nationally known female entrepreneurs/leaders. The panelists should come from a variety of career fields (science, business, arts) and have diverse backgrounds and perspectives. The panel will touch upon challenges faced as a woman during your first career after college and strategies for success. It will also discuss various paths to leadership as a woman. The event will be student-focused and will include a variety of interactive activities to connect students with the panelists. 
Following the event, students will have the opportunity to mingle with panelists and have their resumes reviewed, grab some professional attire from the Free-Use Closet, and have some free headshots taken.

picture_day_info:
As the Chair of the Emerging Leaders Committee and a proud Member of the Board of Directors, I am excited to share some updates on our recent activities and invite you to join us for our upcoming events. Our inaugural Emerging Leaders Summit in October 2023 was a tremendous success, featuring phenomenal and influential speakers providing valuable professional development to over 50 attendees. This success has inspired us to host more impactful programs.
I am thrilled to announce our 
second annual Emerging Leader Conference, which will be held on Thursday, October 17, 2024, from 8 to 11:45 am at The Century House in Latham
. This event promises to be an enriching experience for leaders at all stages. To ensure you don't miss out, be sure to join our Emerging Leaders Committee email list to be the first to know when registration opens.
My journey with the Colonie Chamber — from Marketing Communications Specialist right out of college to serving on the Board of Directors and leading the Emerging Leaders Committee — has been deeply rewarding. I have seen firsthand how leadership development is vital for our community's growth, and I am grateful for the Chamber's support in uniting individuals behind this mission. Your participation is invaluable, and I look forward to seeing you at our events.
Have a warm and wonderful summer, 
Brittany

The Physical address is 1616 15th St, Troy, NY 12180
The Armory will open to employers at 9:00 am for setup. Please do not arrive earlier than 9:00 am.
I am sharing the information about parking below from our Employer Relations Team!

Parking will be in B Lot on campus, across Peoples Ave from the Houston Field House.
Shuttles will be running beginning at 9:00 am between the covered bus shelter at B Lot and the Armory to bring you to and from the Career Fair.
If you need to drop off large display items or materials at the Armory before parking in B Lot, you may drive to the Rear Armory Parking Lot and drop these off any time between 9:00-11:00 am. Volunteers will be available to help unload cars and bring materials to your company's tables while you park. (NOTE: Following GPS directions to the Armory / Alumni Sports & Recreation Center will lead you to the front entrance, where you will NOT be able to unload.

Please note you will need to enter this lot via Griswold Rd, NOT via 15th Street - only the Griswold Rd parking gate will be open for visitors.
Thank you and have a great day!

suggested_school: Academy stock shots PAID all day
picture_day_info:
Hi Steph, 

Wow, three day parent orientation?! That seems like overkill to me, haha!

I’m comfortable with that price point and greatly appreciate the discount. My hope is this is just the beginnings of an all-star collaboration between us!

To confirm, we’re thinking of that Thursday, Sept 5? (Just confirming because there are orientations before that.) I would LOVE to capture happy smiling faces getting off the school bus. The timeline terrifies me, but let me run it past the directors to see what they think. I agree that it could potentially be a good day to do it, before people are 
really 
in the swing of things. Let me reach out and get back to you ASAP.

I will definitely provide a very specific, detailed shot list – to the minute, lol I’m a liiiittle crazy in that regard. 😊  I’ll draft something for you and then lets work together to finalize based on how much time you think each setup will need.

I’m very open to trying to find time for portraits on portrait day, if you are. I was thinking with those that we’d stage them (students and teachers) in a more natural classroom environment (hallways, chalk/whiteboard behind them, etc.).

Just confirm with me that you were thinking 9/5 and I’ll talk to the directors ASAP.

Thank you!!
Kayla

From: 
Stephanie McCauley <
stephanie@ismilestudios.com
>
Date: 
Thursday, August 15, 2024 at 8:47 AM
To: 
Kayla Germain <
GermainK@albanyacademies.org
>
Subject: 
Re: Shoot
Hi Kayla!

Thank you so much for your patience as I got my son settled into college. If you can believe it, there was a three day parent orientation! So different from when I went to school ha ha.

I can’t wait to collaborate with you on this exciting project. My regular hourly rate is $350, but I would gladly discount that to $2000 for the full day for you.  This price is all inclusive, including all fully edited high resolution digital files with a commercial copyright release delivered within 48 hours of the shoot.

The trick may be finding a full day to make this happen, because I am already fully committed through December. We could try to move some stuff around if you had a specific target date in mind. I was also wondering if maybe the first day of school might work? Sometimes, things look the very best on that day and we would be less disruptive to teachers doing actual academic work  Just a thought and I can definitely clear that day for you. 

In my experience, if you have a list of very specific shots that you want, it’s usually better to stage those with cooperative students rather than try to get them organically. 

Regarding formal portraits, perhaps we can handle this on regular school picture day which is I believe September 11, I will have to double check on that but that’s close. There would be no extra charge for any of that, we have all of our lighting set up, and can do either before school, after school, or during a break.  I will be at school the entire week of August 28 photographing seniors, so we could squeeze stuff in there too if you want. 

I will also provide your office with professional portraits of all staff and students for you to use any way you need to. 

I know I just threw a lot at you, but hopefully this can get us thinking and moving in the right direction to get everything set up.

Standing by!!!  ❤️

Steph

Hi Stephanie, 

Happy Monday, I hope you are doing well and had a great weekend!

As you may be aware, the school is going through the process of a rebrand, which will start to rollout this fall. With that, we’re going to be really revamping materials for the school. In short, this fall is going to be a very exciting time!

I know you have shot many things for the school and I’ve been impressed with what I’ve seen. I’m interested in booking a full-day shoot (paid) to capture fresh and needed images, particularly of the now fully co-educational lower and upper schools. I’m envisioning a mix of interior and exterior shots, mocked up classroom environments, hallway shots, etc. I’d also be looking to setup some formal portrait shots of some all-star students. For timing, I’m thinking late-September, ideally to really capture a fall vibe for outside shots. 

Is this something that you would be interested in and are set up for? If so, let’s discuss more your daily rate and some other logistics.

Kayla
